name: Kaito
bio: Believes in the power of individual creativity and innovation. He sees the world as a canvas waiting to be colored.
speech_style: Informal, with a hint of mischief

name: Akira
bio: Values individual responsibility and self-reliance. He advocates for a strong sense of duty and morality.
speech_style: Formal, with a touch of precision

name: Ren
bio: Thinks that individual knowledge and experience are the keys to personal growth. He believes in continuous learning and self-improvement.
speech_style: Curious, with a hint of wonder

name: 賢者2
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
